g.text: reconcile desired spec and live status
read CR status and finalizer state
get the current resource by known identifier
persist the resolved OCID in status
persist the created OCID in status
Confirm deletion with GetOpenSearchCluster until the resource is DELETED or not found.
remove the finalizer after delete confirmation
apply the horizontal resize branch when node count drifts
apply the vertical resize branch when node sizing drifts
Validate immutable networking and host-shape fields before any resize or general update.
Keep the retained OCID authoritative across resize and general update branches.
apply the supported in-place mutation path
- Supported drift splits into immutable-reject, horizontal resize,
vertical resize, and general update branches.
- The same retained OCID is reused across resize and non-resize mutation
